ab: amian kehakay ko a mingaran si Kacivaw, iya rana am mawawaden.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Kacivaw，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Kacivaw, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: no mivatvatek namen am, mamood do kararay namen so ipivatvatek a ka no ipangongopas nojia pivatvatkan a vakong.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: toda ipisa a ipidoa a ipitlo am, vooden namen pa jia.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: am mian so marahet a iyangay na, o nivood na am ji na paolia rana.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: am, amian so karahetan na, ta o nivood na am ji na rana paolia.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: ipisa do araraw, malovot namen a mangay miyowyow.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: mian pa do avak no rarahan am, kadasan si Kacivaw ori a am ji nimapalolo so ipilinalinas na mehma vakong.
ch: 路途中，si Kacivaw想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Kacivaw wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: mamood do kararay namen so ipilinalinas na am, patovisan da am “ko ji nimapalilio.”
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說：「我也沒有帶耶。」
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: to rana lavi si Kacivaw a mioyaoya manci no “nio rana ji voodji nia jiaken so ipilinalinas?”
ch: si Kacivaw急的哭了出來。他生氣的說：「為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙？」
en: Kacivaw burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: tovisan da no kararay namen am “mo kangay ori a ya ji mapalolo, no ya vooden jimo am, mo na ji paolia!”
ch: 同學告訴他：「因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!」
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: ikadoa na araw am, nimadagdag si Kacivaw a makaranes do gako, ka paoli na rana so niveyvood na do kararay namen.
ch: 隔天上學，si Kacivaw很早就到學校了，si Kacivaw把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Kacivaw arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: koan ni Kacivaw am “ji kamo makasnek ang, ciaha ta manaken ko rana o kapalolo ko so aaapen ko. ayoy o niveyvood nio jiaken a meyciamadadayan, ayoy.”
ch: si Kacivaw向同學們說：「我向大家道歉，以後我一定會記得帶東西，謝謝同學們之前願意借我東西，謝謝︕」
en: Kacivaw apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
